name: omnifield-devbox
postCreateCommand: sudo chown -R vscode:vscode /home/vscode/.local/share/pnpm/store /home/vscode/.secrets && sudo chown vscode:vscode /omnifield-registry && mkdir -p "$CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR" && { [ -f "$CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR/.claude.json" ] || printf '%s\n' '{"hasCompletedOnboarding":true,"hasTrustDialogAccepted":true,"theme":"dark"}' > "$CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR/.claude.json"; } && (timeout 20 npm whoami --registry=https://npm.pkg.github.com >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '✖ npm.pkg.github.com: нет валидного PAT в $NPM_CONFIG_USERCONFIG (секрет-volume omnifield-secrets) — @omnifield-пакеты не встанут. Занос кредов: devbox/README §Пост-шаги'; exit 1; }) && pnpm install
